mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.price AS price, SUM(pc.quantity) AS total_quantity, pp.picture_saved_location AS pictureLocation FROM purchases pc JOIN product_options po ON pc.product_option_id = po.id JOIN products p ON po.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_pictures pp ON pp.id = ( SELECT MIN(pp2.id) FROM product_pictures pp2 WHERE pp2.product_id = p.id ) GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.price, pp.picture_saved_location ORDER BY total_quantity DESC, p.id ASC FETCH FIRST 4 ROWS ONLY
